text:
Created attachment 255441
rc.services(8)

I omitted the commands that already have their man pages.

These are covered:

    /etc/rc.d/bridge
    /etc/rc.d/local
    /etc/rc.d/netif
    /etc/rc.d/nfsclient
    /etc/rc.d/power_profile
    /etc/rc.d/routing

I attach the man page - although I do not know how to write man pages from scratch - so I used txt2man(1) to convert - probably result is not perfect - but that is 'secondary' problem that I believe can be overcomed quickly.

Let me know what You think.

Regards,
vermaden
